Smeared kohl dragged asymmetrically past outer corners, mascara dried in streaks down hollow cheeks, deep oxblood lips bitten raw at the center, weathered like perfect makeup after crying.
Skull-carved contour carving temples and cheekbones into starvation-sharp angles, bruise-purple pooled in sunken eye sockets, blue-black lips on a face that looks ancient and ravenous.
Wine-stain shadow bleeding into skin like watercolor left in rain, edges deliberately blurred and indistinct, deep plum lips worn down to a ghost-stain, slept-in and reapplied endlessly.
Monochrome charcoal wash erasing natural face geometry, eyes overdrawn two millimeters past their actual shape, violet-ink lips placed slightly off-center, deeply unsettling and inhuman.
Silent-film enormous eyes ringed in heavy black like Theda Bara's ghost, stark powdered skin, deep cupid's bow lips in obsidian-black, grainy Nosferatu beauty frozen in time.
Fighter's bruise-tones in plum and green-black smudged around orbital bones reading as both damage and glamour, split wine-dark lips, beauty that survived violence and became deadlier.
Deliberately dragged eyeliner pulled downward mid-cheek like Val Garland deconstruction, mascara clumped and separated, deep-plum lips kissed off only on one side, perfectly imperfect decay.
Gaunt hollow-carved undereyes in deep shadow, cheekbones jutting through skin-thin contour, bruise-berry lips on a face starved for centuries, beautiful like famine given form.
Kohl smeared and slept-in then reapplied over itself in dark layers, oxblood lipstick stained into lip cracks like she's worn it for decades, romantic and utterly worn-through.
Face-distorting placement: inner corners extended too far inward, brows drawn higher than anatomically possible, deep wine lips overlined into alien proportions, Isamaya-level geometric wrongness.
Nosferatu-era massive dark-rimmed eyes, heavy black bleeding into bone-white skin, violet-ink lips in exaggerated silent-film cupid's bow, ancient cinematic horror made flesh.
Post-fight beauty: plum and charcoal bruise-shadow beneath cheekbones that reads as injury or artistry, smeared black around eyes like defensive war-paint, blue-black lips split but perfect.
Kohl liner melted and migrated into creases, bleeding asymmetrically toward hairline, lashes clumped with old mascara, deep oxblood lips feathered at edges like they've been worn for days.
Extreme sunken temple contour creating cadaver-hollow geometry, shadow carved so deep the face looks concave, bruise-purple beneath eyes, obsidian-black lips on a starved immortal face.
Deep wine shadow applied then smudged with fingertips until edges vanish into skin, deliberately blurred like a Roversi photograph, plum lips stained and worn translucent at the center.
Eyes drawn three millimeters lower than natural socketline creating alien-sad droop, charcoal wash erasing human proportion, violet-ink lips underlined in shadow, face geometry deliberately broken.
Silent-film exaggerated sockets ringed in thick black kohl like 1920s vampire cinema, skin powdered corpse-pale, deep plum lips in severe bow, grainy historic horror made hyperreal.
Green-black and burgundy bruise-tones smudged across cheekbone and browbone reading as both beating and beauty, wine-dark lips with darker center like dried blood, damaged and devastating.
Mascara deliberately combed then re-wetted and left to dry in separated spikes, liner pulled past outer corner then smeared with thumb, deep-plum lips blotted unevenly, McQueen-runway destruction.
Hollow starvation carved into undereye and nasolabial shadow, cheekbones jutting through skin via extreme contour, blue-black lips on a face that looks genuinely unwell, beauty through deprivation.
Smudged kohl reapplied over itself in archaeological layers, each application visible beneath the next, oxblood lipstick built up and worn down repeatedly, decades compressed into one face.
Brows drawn too high and too straight creating unsettling expression, monochrome shadow washing face into flat wrongness, bruise-berry lips overdrawn asymmetrically, Hungry-style facial distortion.
Theda-Bara enormous black-circled eyes dominating the face, heavy shadow creating deep sockets, bone-white skin, deep wine lips in theatrical silent-era bow, vintage vampire iconography embodied.

Post-violence plum shadow under one cheekbone darker than the other suggesting impact, smeared black around eyes like she fought without removing makeup, violet-ink lips split at corner, dangerous beauty.

Charcoal shadow dragged diagonally across temple like a handprint smeared mid-application, lashes stiff with ancient dried mascara, obsidian-black lips worn transparent at peaks, makeup surviving centuries of touch.
